column8: US: Michigan, Alaska, Yukon, Wisconsin, Maine, Tennessee, Ontario, Briitish Columbia, North Carolina, Quebec, Washington

column10: This page shows the regional trucks limitations for NG+ and Hard Mode -  where you can and can't buy every truck.
Here you can see a cross-check of regional tags per each and every truck.
If it is allowed to be bought in these regions, it has a green YES in cell; if not - a red NO.
